biography: Ricke, a male competitor of discerning taste and sharp wit, is known for his peculiar habit of meticulously lining up his golf balls according to their serial numbers before each tee shot. While the origin of this curious ritual remains shrouded in mystery, it is rumored to be a tribute to a long-lost bet with a fellow golfer.

With a record of two appearances at the Hector Trophée, Ricke has proven to be a formidable, if unconventional, presence on the course. Although he has yet to secure a victory at the tournament, his strategic play and unwavering focus have earned him the respect of his peers. He has also yet to secure a Victor trophy.
While Ricke is currently considered retired from Hector events, his fans are hopeful that he may one day return to grace the greens with his unique blend of skill and eccentricity.
